creator: marat@zealot.ksu.ru
text:
sysutils/gnomebaker ends with signal 11 when 'Data DVD', 'Data CD', 'Audio CD'
	buttons are pressed. segv happens when  
	#1  0x000000000042c15d in project_init (project=0x8060ceea0) at project.c:76
	is called

	here is stack backtrace:

	#0  0x00000008037f0216 in g_type_check_instance_cast ()
	   from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#1  0x000000000042c15d in project_init (project=0x8060ceea0) at project.c:76
	#2  0x00000008037f3261 in g_type_create_instance ()
	   from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#3  0x00000008037d891d in g_object_set () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#4  0x00000008037d738e in g_object_newv () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#5  0x00000008037d7ea0 in g_object_new_valist () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#6  0x00000008037d7fe1 in g_object_new () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#7  0x0000000000433788 in audioproject_new () at audioproject.c:1191
	#8  0x000000000041ae29 in gnomebaker_add_project (type=AUDIO_CD) at gnomebaker.c:828
	#9  0x00000008037d273e in g_closure_invoke () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#10 0x00000008037e6322 in g_signal_parse_name () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#11 0x00000008037e7de7 in g_signal_emit_valist () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#12 0x00000008037e81d3 in g_signal_emit () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#13 0x000000080194dc49 in gtk_button_set_alignment ()
	   from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#14 0x00000008037d273e in g_closure_invoke () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#15 0x00000008037e5fe4 in g_signal_parse_name () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#16 0x00000008037e7de7 in g_signal_emit_valist () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#17 0x00000008037e81d3 in g_signal_emit () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#18 0x000000080194c5b9 in gtk_button_released () from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#19 0x00000008019eacbf in gtk_marshal_BOOLEAN__VOID ()
	   from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#20 0x00000008037d273e in g_closure_invoke () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#21 0x00000008037e64ba in g_signal_parse_name () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#22 0x00000008037e7b10 in g_signal_emit_valist () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#23 0x00000008037e81d3 in g_signal_emit () from /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0
	#24 0x0000000801adea3e in gtk_widget_class_list_style_properties ()
	   from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#25 0x00000008019e3dce in gtk_propagate_event () from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#26 0x00000008019e4eba in gtk_main_do_event () from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#27 0x0000000801dc16dc in gdk_add_client_message_filter ()
	   from /usr/local/lib/libgdk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#28 0x0000000803a41c03 in g_main_context_dispatch () from /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0
	#29 0x0000000803a44ec5 in g_main_context_check () from /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0
	#30 0x0000000803a451c5 in g_main_loop_run () from /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0
	#31 0x00000008019e5242 in gtk_main () from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0
	#32 0x0000000000411838 in main (argc=1, argv=0x7fffffffe7f0) at main.c:162

How-To-Repeat: 	install sysutils/gnomebaker, start it and press any of 'new project' butons
